---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Qingyang Du"
date: "2026-03-28"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# ==============================================================
# Power Analysis: Inflammatory Mechanisms of Cognitive Decline
# in aMCI — Aims 1 and 2
# Bios 6624 (Dr. Fingerlin)
#
# Method:  1-df F-test for a single regression coefficient in MLR
# Package: pwr (pwr.f2.test)
# Outputs: power_curves.pdf, correlation_heatmap.pdf,
#          sample_size_curve.pdf, console tables
# ==============================================================

library(pwr)

# ------ Parameters ------
N     <- 175
alpha <- 0.0125

# ------ Preliminary Data (n = 30) ------
d <- read.csv("PrelimData.csv")

cat("=== Preliminary Data Summary ===\n")
print(summary(d))
cat("\nSDs:\n"); print(round(sapply(d, sd), 4))
cat("\nCorrelations:\n"); print(round(cor(d), 4))

# Observed |r| values
r_obs <- c(
  "IL6_CVLT"  = abs(cor(d$IL_6,  d$CVLT_CNG3)),
  "IL6_CORT"  = abs(cor(d$IL_6,  d$CORT_CNG3)),
  "MCP1_CVLT" = abs(cor(d$MCP_1, d$CVLT_CNG3)),
  "MCP1_CORT" = abs(cor(d$MCP_1, d$CORT_CNG3))
)
labels_obs <- c("IL-6 -> CVLT change", "IL-6 -> Cortical change",
                "MCP-1 -> CVLT change", "MCP-1 -> Cortical change")

cat("\nObserved |r| values:\n")
for (i in seq_along(r_obs))
  cat(sprintf("  %s: |r| = %.4f, r^2 = %.4f\n",
              labels_obs[i], r_obs[i], r_obs[i]^2))

# ------ Helpers ------
get_power <- function(r, N, k, alpha) {
  pwr.f2.test(u = 1, v = N - k - 1,
              f2 = r^2 / (1 - r^2), sig.level = alpha)$power
}

min_det_r <- function(N, k, alpha, target = 0.80) {
  uniroot(function(r) get_power(r, N, k, alpha) - target,
          c(0.01, 0.99))$root
}

req_N <- function(r, k, alpha, target = 0.80) {
  v <- pwr.f2.test(u = 1, f2 = r^2 / (1 - r^2),
                   sig.level = alpha, power = target)$v
  ceiling(v + k + 1)
}

print_table <- function(r_vals, N, k, alpha, labels = NULL) {
  if (is.null(labels)) labels <- sprintf("%.2f", r_vals)
  cat(sprintf("%-28s %6s %8s %8s %10s\n",
              "", "|r|", "r^2", "Power", "N for 80%"))
  cat(strrep("-", 64), "\n")
  for (i in seq_along(r_vals)) {
    pwr <- get_power(r_vals[i], N, k, alpha)
    n   <- req_N(r_vals[i], k, alpha)
    cat(sprintf("%-28s %6.4f %8.4f %8.4f %10d\n",
                labels[i], r_vals[i], r_vals[i]^2, pwr, n))
  }
  r_min <- min_det_r(N, k, alpha)
  cat(sprintf("\nMin detectable |r| at N=%d, 80%% power: %.4f (r^2 = %.4f)\n",
              N, r_min, r_min^2))
  invisible(r_min)
}

# ==============================================================
# H1a (k = 4)
# ==============================================================
k_h1a <- 4
cat("\n\n=== H1a: Baseline Marker -> Change in Outcome ===\n")
cat(sprintf("k = %d, N = %d, alpha = %.4f, df2 = %d\n\n",
            k_h1a, N, alpha, N - k_h1a - 1))
r_min_h1a <- print_table(r_obs, N, k_h1a, alpha, labels_obs)

# ==============================================================
# H1b (k = 5)
# ==============================================================
k_h1b <- 5
cat("\n\n=== H1b: Change in Marker -> Change in Outcome ===\n")
cat(sprintf("k = %d, N = %d, alpha = %.4f, df2 = %d\n",
            k_h1b, N, alpha, N - k_h1b - 1))
cat("No direct prelim estimates; H1a |r| values are upper bounds.\n\n")
r_range <- c(0.10, 0.15, 0.20, 0.25, 0.30, 0.35)
r_min_h1b <- print_table(r_range, N, k_h1b, alpha)

# ==============================================================
# Aim 2 (k = 6)
# ==============================================================
k_aim2 <- 6
cat("\n\n=== Aim 2: Marker x Amyloid Interaction ===\n")
cat(sprintf("k = %d, N = %d, alpha = %.4f, df2 = %d\n",
            k_aim2, N, alpha, N - k_aim2 - 1))
cat("No direct prelim estimates for interaction partial R^2.\n\n")
r_range_a2 <- c(0.10, 0.15, 0.20, 0.25, 0.30, 0.35)
r_min_aim2 <- print_table(r_range_a2, N, k_aim2, alpha)

# ==============================================================
# SUMMARY
# ==============================================================
cat("\n\n=== SUMMARY ===\n")
cat(sprintf("N = %d | alpha = %.4f (Bonferroni, 4 markers/outcome)\n\n", N, alpha))
cat("Min detectable |r| (80% power):\n")
cat(sprintf("  H1a  (k=%d): %.4f\n  H1b  (k=%d): %.4f\n  Aim2 (k=%d): %.4f\n",
            k_h1a, min_det_r(N, k_h1a, alpha),
            k_h1b, min_det_r(N, k_h1b, alpha),
            k_aim2, min_det_r(N, k_aim2, alpha)))

cat("\nH1a power at observed effect sizes:\n")
for (i in seq_along(r_obs))
  cat(sprintf("  %s: |r|=%.4f, power=%.1f%%\n",
              labels_obs[i], r_obs[i],
              get_power(r_obs[i], N, k_h1a, alpha) * 100))

cat(sprintf("\nObserved |r| range: %.4f to %.4f\n", min(r_obs), max(r_obs)))


# ==============================================================
# FIGURE 1: CORRELATION HEATMAP
# ==============================================================
cormat <- cor(d)

# Rename for display
rownames(cormat) <- colnames(cormat) <- c(
  "CVLT\n(Cognitive)", "Cortical\n(Cognitive)",
  "IL-6\n(Inflammation)", "MCP-1\n(Inflammation)"
)

pdf("correlation_heatmap.pdf", width = 7, height = 6)
par(mar = c(7, 7, 3, 5))

# Color palette: blue (negative) -> white (zero) -> red (positive)
n_col <- 200
blue_red <- colorRampPalette(c("steelblue", "white", "firebrick"))(n_col)

image(1:4, 1:4, t(cormat[4:1, ]), col = blue_red, zlim = c(-1, 1),
      axes = FALSE, xlab = "", ylab = "",
      main = "Pearson Correlation Matrix (Preliminary Data, n = 30)")

axis(1, at = 1:4, labels = colnames(cormat), las = 2, cex.axis = 0.85)
axis(2, at = 1:4, labels = rev(rownames(cormat)), las = 1, cex.axis = 0.85)

# Add correlation values
for (i in 1:4) {
  for (j in 1:4) {
    text(i, 5 - j, sprintf("%.2f", cormat[j, i]),
         cex = 1.1, font = 2)
  }
}

# Add box
box()

dev.off()
cat("\nSaved: correlation_heatmap.pdf\n")


# ==============================================================
# FIGURE 2: POWER CURVES (3-panel, as before)
# ==============================================================
r_seq <- seq(0.05, 0.70, by = 0.005)

pdf("power_curves.pdf", width = 10, height = 12)
par(mfrow = c(3, 1), mar = c(5, 5, 4, 2))

# --- H1a ---
pwr_h1a <- sapply(r_seq, get_power, N = N, k = k_h1a, alpha = alpha)
plot(r_seq, pwr_h1a, type = "l", lwd = 2.5, col = "steelblue",
     xlab = "|r|  (zero-order correlation)", ylab = "Power",
     main = sprintf("H1a: Baseline Marker -> Change in Outcome (N=%d, k=%d, alpha=%.4f)",
                     N, k_h1a, alpha),
     ylim = c(0, 1), las = 1)
abline(h = 0.80, lty = 2, col = "gray40")
abline(v = min_det_r(N, k_h1a, alpha), lty = 3, col = "gray40")
obs_col <- c("red", "darkgreen", "darkorange", "purple")
obs_pch <- c(16, 17, 15, 18)
for (i in seq_along(r_obs))
  points(r_obs[i], get_power(r_obs[i], N, k_h1a, alpha),
         pch = obs_pch[i], col = obs_col[i], cex = 1.8)
legend("bottomright", labels_obs, pch = obs_pch, col = obs_col,
       pt.cex = 1.4, cex = 0.85, bg = "white")

# --- H1b ---
pwr_h1b <- sapply(r_seq, get_power, N = N, k = k_h1b, alpha = alpha)
plot(r_seq, pwr_h1b, type = "l", lwd = 2.5, col = "steelblue",
     xlab = expression("|r|  (partial correlation of " * Delta * "marker)"),
     ylab = "Power",
     main = sprintf("H1b: Change in Marker -> Change in Outcome (N=%d, k=%d, alpha=%.4f)",
                     N, k_h1b, alpha),
     ylim = c(0, 1), las = 1)
abline(h = 0.80, lty = 2, col = "gray40")
abline(v = min_det_r(N, k_h1b, alpha), lty = 3, col = "gray40")
rect(min(r_obs), -0.02, max(r_obs), 1.02,
     col = rgb(0.7, 0.85, 1, 0.2), border = NA)
text(mean(range(r_obs)), 0.15,
     "Range of H1a observed |r|\n(upper bound for H1b)", cex = 0.8, col = "steelblue4")

# --- Aim 2 ---
pwr_aim2 <- sapply(r_seq, get_power, N = N, k = k_aim2, alpha = alpha)
plot(r_seq, pwr_aim2, type = "l", lwd = 2.5, col = "steelblue",
     xlab = "partial |r|  (interaction term)", ylab = "Power",
     main = sprintf("Aim 2: Marker x Amyloid Interaction (N=%d, k=%d, alpha=%.4f)",
                     N, k_aim2, alpha),
     ylim = c(0, 1), las = 1)
abline(h = 0.80, lty = 2, col = "gray40")
abline(v = min_det_r(N, k_aim2, alpha), lty = 3, col = "gray40")
text(0.50, 0.30, "Interaction effects are typically\nsmaller than main effects",
     cex = 0.85, col = "gray40", font = 3)

dev.off()
cat("Saved: power_curves.pdf\n")


# ==============================================================
# FIGURE 3: REQUIRED SAMPLE SIZE vs PARTIAL CORRELATION
# ==============================================================
# Shows N required for 80% power as a function of |r|,
# with horizontal reference line at N = 175.
# One curve per hypothesis/aim to show the df impact.

r_seq_n <- seq(0.08, 0.70, by = 0.005)

n_h1a  <- sapply(r_seq_n, req_N, k = k_h1a,  alpha = alpha)
n_h1b  <- sapply(r_seq_n, req_N, k = k_h1b,  alpha = alpha)
n_aim2 <- sapply(r_seq_n, req_N, k = k_aim2, alpha = alpha)

pdf("sample_size_curve.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
par(mar = c(5, 5, 4, 2))

plot(r_seq_n, n_h1a, type = "l", lwd = 2.5, col = "steelblue",
     xlab = "Partial correlation |r|",
     ylab = "Required sample size (N)",
     main = sprintf("Required N for 80%% Power (alpha = %.4f)", alpha),
     ylim = c(0, 1200), las = 1)
lines(r_seq_n, n_h1b,  lwd = 2.5, col = "darkorange", lty = 2)
lines(r_seq_n, n_aim2, lwd = 2.5, col = "firebrick",  lty = 4)

# Reference line at N = 175
abline(h = 175, lty = 2, col = "gray40", lwd = 1.5)
text(0.55, 210, sprintf("Proposed N = %d", N), cex = 0.9, col = "gray30")

# Mark min detectable |r| for each
r_min_vals <- c(min_det_r(N, k_h1a, alpha),
                min_det_r(N, k_h1b, alpha),
                min_det_r(N, k_aim2, alpha))
points(r_min_vals, rep(175, 3), pch = 16,
       col = c("steelblue", "darkorange", "firebrick"), cex = 1.5)

legend("topright",
       legend = c(sprintf("H1a (k=%d)", k_h1a),
                  sprintf("H1b (k=%d)", k_h1b),
                  sprintf("Aim 2 (k=%d)", k_aim2)),
       col = c("steelblue", "darkorange", "firebrick"),
       lwd = 2.5, lty = c(1, 2, 4), cex = 0.9, bg = "white")

dev.off()
cat("Saved: sample_size_curve.pdf\n")


```
